name: Black Bean Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry bacon over medium heat in a small heavy frying pan until crisp. Crumble the bacon and set aside.
2. Heat the bacon drippings over medium heat. Add onion and celery. Sauté until tender, stirring occasionally.
3. Puree the beans (or blend them if preferred) and stir into the vegetables.
4. Mix in the crumbled bacon and remaining ingredients. Stir occasionally until the soup is hot.
5. The soup will thicken as it stands. If needed, thin with additional water before serving.
Food Exchanges per serving: 1 STARCH EXCHANGE + 1/2 FAT EXCHANGE CHO: 18g; PRO: 6g; FAT: 3g; CAL: 124; For low-sodium diets, omit salt.
Source: The Art of Cooking for the Diabetic by Mary Abbott Hess, R.D., M.S. and Katharine Middleton.
